title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, embed, list models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models & conversations in the browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on Windows/macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of ready-to-use function-calling tools (weather, GitHub, shell, etc.) for Ollama chats.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Curated registry of community-tuned GGUF models with one-click import into Ollama.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Next.js chatbot template with streaming, RAG, and Docker compose for Ollama + Postgres.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds an /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM queries.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Minimal Telegram bot using python-telegram-bot to chat with Ollama models privately or in groups.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that spins up Ollama containers to run LLM-based tests or code reviews.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP and native JSON parsing.
